item.name: Classic Eggs Benedict
item.description: Poached eggs on artisanal sourdough with wilted spinach and homemade hollandaise sauce.

item.name: Smashed Avocado & Feta
item.description: Fresh avocado with Danish feta, pomegranate seeds, and lemon oil on toasted rye.

item.name: Truffle Mushroom Medley
item.description: Sautéed seasonal mushrooms with truffle butter, thyme, and a soft poached egg.

item.name: Belgian Waffle Stack
item.description: Triple stack waffles with mixed berry compote, maple syrup, and vanilla bean mascarpone.

item.name: Acai Power Bowl
item.description: Organic acai blend topped with gluten-free granola, seasonal fruits, and chia seeds.

item.name: Spanish Chorizo Omelette
item.description: Three-egg omelette with spicy chorizo, Manchego cheese, and caramelized onions.

item.name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
item.description: Tasmanian smoked salmon with dill cream cheese, capers, and red onion on a toasted bagel.

item.name: Zucchini & Corn Fritters
item.description: Crispy fritters served with tomato relish, bacon, and a side of fresh rocket.

item.name: Signature Latte
item.description: House-blend espresso with silky textured milk and artisan latte art.

item.name: 12-Hour Cold Brew
item.description: Single-origin beans steeped for 12 hours for a smooth, chocolatey finish.

item.name: Iced Matcha Latte
item.description: Premium ceremonial grade matcha whisked with honey and milk over ice.
